Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: White linen shirt, black trousers, silver vine-leaf pocket watch
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, short black hair, brown eyes, thin build, average-looking features with a deep outline, scholarly air, wearing a linen shirt
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Four faint black dots on the back of the hand forming a small square
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 9 reveals the physical marks left by the ritual and his academic background in history.

Zhou Mingrui.visual_anchor: early 20s Chinese male, short black hair, dark brown eyes, wearing modern sleepwear
Zhou Mingrui.source_notes: Introduced himself as 'The Fool' and fully accepted his identity as Klein.

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: long, reaching down to her vest
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: wears a tattered veil cap and carries a self-sewn bag
Melissa Moretti.face_description: thin and slightly pale face, lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Klein notes her frugal nature regarding meat and gas usage.

Senior Associate Professor Cohen.primary_clothing: Formal grey academic gown over a black suit, spectacles
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.face_description: Deep forehead wrinkles, sharp eyes behind glasses, thin lips, authoritative aura
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.visual_anchor: late 50s male, pale skin, grey thinning hair, wearing spectacles and a formal grey academic gown
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.source_notes: Mentioned as a mentor/senior academic at Khoy University.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: Radiates the air of a wealthy banker's son
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Identified as a classmate and friend of Klein, son of a banker from Constant City.

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.source_notes: Classmate of Klein who worked with Welch on the Fourth Epoch notebook.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Mentioned as the deity worshipped by Klein's mother; visuals are entirely guessed based on her divine title.

Lord of Storms.primary_clothing: robes woven from dark storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.face_description: Stern, majestic face with a strong jawline, intense brow arch, and piercing eyes.
Lord of Storms.visual_anchor: ageless male, muscular build, wild dark blue hair, electric blue eyes, wearing robes of storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.color_palette: storm black, dark blue, electric yellow, charcoal grey
Lord of Storms.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Lord of Storms.source_notes: Mentioned as a deity; visual details guessed based on the name and context.
